title: CI Matrices, Required Checks, Caching, and Merge Policy · Risk Brief: Matrix Support
summary: Build a secure required-check workflow across supported environments. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates matrix support increment in a required CI quality-gate workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test declared runtime, operating-system, database, and feature support intentionally.
Order cheap discriminating checks before expensive matrices while preserving useful parallelism.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
